title: 🔥估值进入深度击球区
body: 市场处于深度低估状态。AHR999(3D)报0.33，落入抄底区间，价格较200日成本线深贴-16.9%。这意味着当前价格远低于长期持有者平均成本，下行空间被数据极值压缩。核心指标显示筹码锁定良好，盈亏比极具吸引力。偏多。左侧布局时机已至？
body_en: The market is deeply undervalued. AHR999 (3D) prints 0.33, dropping into the accumulation zone, with price trading -16.9% below the 200-day cost basis. This implies current price is well below the long-term holder average cost; downside is being compressed by data extremes. Core metrics show supply is locked tight. The risk/reward is extremely attractive. Bias: Long. Time for left-side positioning?
